THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEHRT, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 80 ELGIN PARK #1, S.F., STAYED UNTIL JAN-27-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:30PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION AND KEYS RETURNED TO MANAGEMENT COMPANY. PLTF WVS BACK RENT AND DAMAGES THRU 1/27/98. DEFT WAIVES HIS SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS INCLUDING PURS 1542CC.
